title: Salivary Protein Extraction and Precipitation Protocol
author: Jennifer Orozco Paez
materials: Discard the supernatant carefully without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Collect a minimum of 5 mL...
steps.instruction: Collect a minimum of 5 mL of saliva into a 15 mL Falcon tube.

steps.title: Add an equal volume of Milli-Q...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of Milli-Q water to the saliva sample (1:1 v/v ratio).

steps.title: Vortex the mixture for 30 seconds to ensure homogeneity
steps.instruction: Vortex the mixture for 30 seconds to ensure homogeneity.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3500 rpm for 25 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3500 rpm for 25 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Carefully collect the supernatant and aliquot...
steps.instruction: Carefully collect the supernatant and aliquot into four 1000 µL portions.

steps.title: Store the aliquots at -40°C until further analysis
steps.instruction: Store the aliquots at -40°C until further analysis.

steps.title: To each 1000 µL saliva aliquot,...
steps.instruction: To each 1000 µL saliva aliquot, add 1000 µL of 20% TCA solution.

steps.title: Vortex the mixture for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex the mixture for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Incubate the samples at -20°C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples at -20°C for 30 minutes to facilitate protein precipitation.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 rpm for 30 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 rpm for 30 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of cold 90% acetone to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of cold 90% acetone to the pellet.

steps.title: Vortex for 30 seconds to wash the pellet
steps.instruction: Vortex for 30 seconds to wash the pellet.

steps.title: Incubate at -20°C for 20 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at -20°C for 20 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 5 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 5 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of cold 80% acetone to the pellet
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of cold 80% acetone to the pellet.

steps.title: Vortex for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Incubate at -20°C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at -20°C for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 10 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 8000 rpm for 10 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Allow the pellet to air-dry for...
steps.instruction: Allow the pellet to air-dry for 5 minutes to remove residual acetone.

steps.title: Resuspend the dried protein pellet in 10 µL of 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend the dried protein pellet in 10 µL of 0.2 M NaOH.

steps.title: Incubate the solution for 2 minutes...
steps.instruction: Incubate the solution for 2 minutes at room temperature to solubilize the proteins.

steps.title: Add 50 µL of 2D buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of 2D buffer (Urea 7 M, Thiourea 2 M, CHAPS 4%) to the solution.

steps.title: Vortex the mixture for 30 seconds to ensure complete dissolution
steps.instruction: Vortex the mixture for 30 seconds to ensure complete dissolution.

steps.title: Collect the supernatant for protein quantification
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant for protein quantification.

steps.title: Determine the protein concentration using the...
steps.instruction: Determine the protein concentration using the Bradford assay according to the manufacturer's instructions.
